reviews.author: Ramesh Kumar
reviews.text: Highly accurate predictions and practical advice. His calculation of planetary transits was 100% correct, and the suggested remedies brought immediate relief. Very professional astrologer in Chennai.

reviews.author: Meenakshi Sundaram
reviews.text: Best vastu and Muhurtham calculations in Chengalpattu area. We approached him for selecting an auspicious time for our new family showroom inauguration. The auspicious timing chosen has brought positive growth.

reviews.author: Suresh & Priya
reviews.text: We consulted Karthikeya Astrological Centre for marriage compatibility checking. He patiently evaluated all aspect calculations, dosha matching, and nakshatra alignment. Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Rajesh Kannan
reviews.text: Kadikara Prasannam predictions were extremely detailed and accurate. Answered all my immediate career queries clearly and gave simple remedial guidelines. The consultation was very reassuring.

reviews.author: Aishwarya Raghavan
reviews.text: Very patient and scientific approach. His horoscope reading provided a clear insight into my planetary positions and career transitions. Highly recommend his services.
